# Spec Summary (Lite)

Establish the full-stack foundation of AntarMind AI: a .NET 10 API with Azure EasyAuth authentication, Azure Table Storage persistence with in-memory fallback, and a React 19 frontend where users can submit, view, and delete thought entries. This phase delivers a working end-to-end data pipeline — from UI input through the authenticated API to durable storage — forming the base on which all intelligence features will be built.
